chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 4637 of 2022 CP D 2472 of 2022 CP D 3058 of 2022 CP D 3103 of 2022 CP D 4422 of 2022 CP D 4959 of 2022 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.19684/2022 2. For hearing of main case 24.02.2025 Mr. Israr Ahmed, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Per learned counsel the petitioners shall approach the concerned department for their representation in order to allay any grievance. Learned Assistant Advocate General Sindh states that any such application shall be decided on its own merits after providing an opportunity of hearing to the applicants / petitioners. It is jointly stated that this petition may be disposed off in the above terms. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matters. Judge Judge Amjad
